sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 13.4 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.13)

statement.latex: Let$G$be a group with a normal (pro-) 0.5ex 2-sub\-group$N$such that$G/N$is isomorphic to$GL_n(2)$, inducing its natural module on$N/ (N)$, the Frattini factor-group of~$N$. For$n=3$determine$G$such that$N$is as large as possible. (For$n>3$it can be proved that already the Frattini subgroup$(N)$of$N$is trivial; for$n=2$there exists$G$such that$N$is the free pro-2-group generated by two elements).

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
